---
  title: "Unit 1 For Live Session"
  author: "Isabella"
  date: "1/21/2026"
  output:
  html_document: default
  word_document: default
---
  
# Data Scientist Profile
```{r}
skill = c("Data Viz", "ML", "Math", "Stats", "Comp Sci","Comm", "Domain Exp")  
level = c(3,1,7,6,5,7,4)  

par(mar = c(7, 4, 4, 2)) #margins
barplot(  
  level,  
  names.arg = skill,  
  ylim = c(0, 8),  
  main = "Data Scientist Profile",  
  las = 2, #makes the labels vertical  
  cex.names = 0.8
)  
```
